title: IT SPECIALIST
summary: Results-driven Software Engineer with over 5 years of experience delivering reliable technology solutions in healthcare, FMCG, and education. Proven ability to manage complex network infrastructure, enterprise software platforms, and end-user support within high-demand environments. Skilled at aligning IT operations with business objectives while maintaining system uptime, data integrity, and service excellence.

professionalExperiences.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Coordinate multi-brand onboarding by integrating menus, pricing, and branding requirements into the mobile delivery platform.
Monitor daily app operations, ensuring seamless order processing, dispatch, and delivery performance across all partnered brands.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (engineering, design, and marketing) to implement feature updates that support multiple brand experiences within the app.
Analyze user behavior and order data to optimize app performance, improve customer satisfaction, and increase conversion rates for each brand.
Manage relationships with brand partners, addressing operational issues, maintaining service standards, and ensuring compliance with platform guidelines.
Oversee quality assurance by testing new features, identifying bugs, and ensuring consistent functionality across different brand interfaces within the app.

professionalExperiences.title: Software Developer
responsibilities: Assist in the development and implementation of ERP systems to streamline healthcare operations, including patient records, billing, and inventory management.
Collaborate with clinical, administrative, and IT teams to gather requirements and ensure the ERP system aligns with healthcare workflows and regulatory standards.
Support system testing, debugging, and deployment to ensure the ERP platform functions accurately and efficiently across departments.
Analyze operational data within the ERP system to improve decision-making, resource allocation, and overall service delivery.
Provide user training and technical support to healthcare staff to ensure effective adoption and utilization of the ERP system.
Maintain system documentation and ensure compliance with healthcare regulations, data privacy standards, and security protocols.

professionalExperiences.title: Programming Instructor
responsibilities: Instructed students on core IT networking concepts, covering network topologies, protocols, and infrastructure design to build a strong foundational understanding of enterprise environments.

Guided students through the configuration of complex network systems, including NAT (Network Address Translation) and OSPF routing protocols, with hands-on lab exercises that simulate real-world scenarios.
Delivered practical lessons on server administration, teaching students how to deploy, configure, and maintain servers across Windows and Linux environments.
Mentored students through network troubleshooting and diagnostics, strengthening their ability to identify and resolve connectivity issues, misconfigurations, and performance bottlenecks.

Collaborated with academic teams to design curriculum that reflects current industry standards, incorporating live network simulations and practical projects to enhance student readiness for professional roles.

Supported students in understanding scalable and secure network design principles, including firewall configuration, access control, and the integration of network services across distributed systems.
